هو رابط إلكتروني لنسخة رقمية من المستند: It is an electronic link to a digital copy of the original document (an image or a PDF file) uploaded to a cloud storage service. Placing the link in the record makes the document documented and openable directly from the table with a single click, without searching through the paper archive.

يرجى مراجعة قسم الحركة عند اقتراب أي انت: Please contact the Movement Department when any expiry is approaching.
يُعدّ سجل التوثيق وثيقة مرجعية رسمية تُث: The documentation record serves as an official reference document that records every incident related to the fleet (accidents, violations, maintenance, warnings) along with its date, reference number, and status. In any administrative investigation, accident, or vehicle handover/receipt process, this dated record constitutes evidence that protects the rights of the movement officer and the Movement Department and proves the soundness of the procedures followed.
يُوثّق هذا السجل كل واقعة تتعلق بالأسطول: This record documents every incident related to the fleet (accidents, traffic violations, vehicle handover and receipt, maintenance, warnings, administrative investigations) along with its date, reference, and status.
